　　系统说：身为厨子，让食客体会到美味是本职工作。
　　系统又说：身为一个美味的缔造者，又怎么能让工作束缚呢？
　　以至于……
　　“叮，本月任务，应聘饭店厨师，干满半个月跑路！即可结算系统奖励……”
　　徐远：“好你个老六！”
　　于是。
　　饭店老板：“不是我吹，我们家厨师手艺绝了！他应聘第一天试菜，就做了一碗刀板香，那味道香的我当场口水都流出来了。”
　　会所老板：“别看我们这只是一个会所，我跟你们说，来我们这的顾客，那都是冲着我们厨子的手艺来的！你见过会所的饭菜堪比国宴的不？”
　　4S店：“我们虽然是卖车的，但是顾客都是冲着我们的食堂来的！能吃上徐师傅的饭菜，工资不要我都行！”
　　食客：“嗯嗯嗯！你说的对，我到你们会所，那就是为了吃饭来的，跟小姐姐的腿一点关系都没有……”
　　有这样的厨子，还愁生意不够兴隆？就在老板们高兴的时候……
　　“老板！不好了，咱家厨子跑路了！”
　　食客：“啥玩意？嗯？”
　　老板：“天塌了……”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d2b757d54944a4825cc97a5d7d364abd","author":"一朵肘子花","author_id":"","book_id":"7320343181097192510","book_name":"我离职的那一天，食客老板疯三天","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8c8b0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7320343255491543614","read_count":"27871","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1055680"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"512","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,美食","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b12f3666728c8a5c5ed6d95dac8b612c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365091&x-signature=ZATPFN7qU%2FKaAqMFWtyRnX%2BiuOM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2484546788933214","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"50"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322200450533766F569BE3A094FB7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5096,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":10031},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7352001392492069694","com
